message:
test(promise): expand from 80 to 114 tests for promise/future API (wa-3baz8)

New tests in lib.rs (20 tests): waker replacement behavior, concurrent
resolve+poll stress, Arc/HashMap/Box<dyn>/f64/Option<None> types,
error chaining, triple-resolve semantics, promise-ok/err waker
notification, drop-after-pending, multiple futures second-gets-nothing,
default-vs-new equivalence.

New tests in spawn.rs (14 tests): captured variable closures, deep
async nesting, tuple results, fibonacci computation, mixed priority
tasks, async chain, scoped executor with Result types, sequential
reuse, low priority multiple tasks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
